query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A printed photograph of several people walking across a pedestrian crosswalk hangs from a thin silver ribbon against a textured golden-green surface. The crosswalk features bold white stripes on dark pavement. The group includes individuals wearing a black t-shirt with a graphic print, a red shirt over a pink-and-white striped dress, a black shirt with khaki pants, and others carrying bags including a yellow item. Green foliage from trees forms the background behind the walkers. The printed photograph casts a soft shadow on the golden surface behind it, and the ribbon passes over the top edge of the print, securing it in place.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred printed photograph of several people walking across a pedestrian crosswalk hangs crookedly from a thin silver ribbon against a textured golden-green surface, with the image tilted at an angle. The motion blur streaks the figures and surroundings into vertical smears, dissolving individual features and details. The crosswalk features bold white stripes on dark pavement. The group includes individuals wearing a black t-shirt with a graphic print, a red shirt over a pink-and-white striped dress, a black shirt with khaki pants, and others carrying bags including a yellow item. Green foliage from trees forms the background behind the walkers. The printed photograph casts a soft shadow on the golden surface behind it, and the ribbon passes over the top edge of the print, securing it in place while contributing to the off-kilter, casually hung presentation.
